languages.text: "Ваша Светлость, вы вернулись... Слава Богу-Императору". {n}Ваш сенешаль убирает оружие в ножны, взирая на вас с явным облегчением.{/n}
"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость, вы вернулись... Слава Богу-Императору". {n}Ваш сенешаль убирает оружие в ножны, взирая на вас с явным облегчением.{/n}

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}

languages.text: 「陛下、帰ってきたのね…神皇帝に感謝あれ」{n}あなたの執事、武器を鞘にしまい、裸の安堵で君を見つめている.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「おぬし、帰ってきたのね…神皇帝に感謝あれ」{n}あなたの執事、武器を鞘にしまい、裸の安堵で君を見つめている.{/n}

languages.text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha vuelto... Gracias al Dios Emperador». {n}Tu Senescal guarda su arma y te mira con evidente alivio.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, ha vuelto... Gracias al Dios Emperador». {n}Tu Senescal guarda su arma y te mira con evidente alivio.{/n}

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Ihr seid zurückgekehrt ... Dem Gottimperator sei Dank." {n}Dein Truchsess steckt seine Waffe zurück in ihre Scheide und sieht dich sichtlich erleichtert an.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, Ihr seid zurückgekehrt ... Dem Gottimperator sei Dank." {n}Dein Truchsess steckt seine Waffe zurück in ihre Scheide und sieht dich sichtlich erleichtert an.{/n}

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, vous êtes de retour... L'Empereur soit loué. » {n}Votre sénéchal rengaine son arme, manifestement soulagé.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, vous êtes de retour... L'Empereur soit loué. » {n}Votre sénéchal rengaine son arme, manifestement soulagé.{/n}

languages.text: “大人，您回来了……感谢神皇。”{n}你的总领将武器收回鞘中，毫不掩饰地以如释重负的目光凝视着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you have returned... Thank the God-Emperor." {n}Your Seneschal puts his weapon back in its sheath, staring at you with naked relief.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “大人，您回来了……感谢神皇。”{n}你的总领将武器收回鞘中，毫不掩饰地以如释重负的目光凝视着你。{/n}

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, geri döndünüz... Tanrı İmparator'a şükürler olsun." {n}Sana açık bir rahatlamayla bakan Seneşal, silahını kınına geri koyuyor.{/n}
